template_block.name: high-stakes-compliance-summary
template_block.title: High-Stakes Compliance Summary
template_block.statement: Use this summary at the end of a response when the output is high-stakes.

checklist.entry: public-facing or stakeholder-facing artefacts
production code or operational implementation guidance
legal, policy, security, privacy, accessibility, safeguarding, or ethics assessments
procurement, commercial, or spend-control material
service assessment, assurance, or sign-off preparation
outputs that could materially affect users, staff, participants, or personal-data handling

template_block.statement: Keep it short. Use explicit statuses. Do not claim clean compliance where evidence is weak or review is still required.

checklist.entry: Legal: Pass / Review needed / Blocker
Security: Pass / Review needed / Blocker
Privacy: Pass / Review needed / Blocker
Accessibility: Pass / Review needed / Blocker
Ethics: Pass / Review needed / Blocker
Policy: Pass / Review needed / Blocker
QA: Pass / Review needed / Blocker
User need: Clear / Partial / Unclear
Affected groups: One short line, or state Not fully assessed
Material harms: None identified / Identified - one short line
Human sign-off: Name the accountable human or state Owner not yet named
Escalation required: None / Legal / Privacy / Security / Accessibility / Ethics / Safeguarding / Service owner / Other
Residual risk: One short sentence
Residual harm: One short sentence
Decision status: Advisory only / Ready for human review / Blocked pending review
Omit lines only when they are genuinely irrelevant.
If any line is Blocker, the summary must not imply readiness.
If material harms have not been assessed, say so explicitly and do not imply safe readiness.
If disagreement remains unresolved, say so explicitly and identify the human decision needed.
